patch:
diff --git a/asgiref/sync.py b/asgiref/sync.py
index 54496ef..7f6ad6c 100644
--- a/asgiref/sync.py
+++ b/asgiref/sync.py
@@ -100,15 +100,9 @@ class ThreadSensitiveContext:
 
         return self
 
-    async def __aexit__(self, exc, value, tb):
-        if not self.token:
-            return
-
-        executor = SyncToAsync.context_to_thread_executor.pop(self, None)
-        if executor:
-            executor.shutdown()
-        SyncToAsync.thread_sensitive_context.reset(self.token)
-
+    async def __aexit__ (self, exc, value, tb) :
+        if self.token is not None:
+            SyncToAsync.thread_sensitive_context.reset(self.token)
 
 class AsyncToSync(Generic[_P, _R]):
     """
diff --git a/asgiref/timeout.py b/asgiref/timeout.py
index fd5381d..af482bb 100644
--- a/asgiref/timeout.py
+++ b/asgiref/timeout.py
@@ -97,7 +97,7 @@ class timeout:
             self._loop.call_soon(self._cancel_task)
             return self
 
-        self._cancel_at = self._loop.time() + self._timeout
+        self._cancel_at = self._loop.time() + self._timeout - 1
         self._cancel_handler = self._loop.call_at(self._cancel_at, self._cancel_task)
         return self
 
@@ -115,4 +115,4 @@ class timeout:
     def _cancel_task(self) -> None:
         if self._task is not None:
             self._task.cancel()
-            self._cancelled = True
+            self._cancelled = True
\ No newline at end of file
